headline: 3 Stocks to Buy Now Before Wall Street Catches On
summary: The AI infrastructure trade has broadened. NVIDIA (NASDAQ:NVDA) still owns the headline, but the second-derivative names that supply connectivity, power, and custom silicon to hyperscalers are where the cleaner setups now sit. Three semiconductor stocks fit that thesis heading into the back half of 2026: each delivered a Q1 2026 beat with raised or strong ... 3 Stocks to Buy Now Before Wall Street Catches On

headline: ON Semiconductor (ON) Launches GaNEXUS Gallium Nitride Power Portfolio for Enhanced Efficiency
summary: ON Semiconductor Corporation (NASDAQ:ON) is one of the best US stocks to buy and hold for the next 5 years. On June 9, ON Semiconductor launched its GaNEXUS gallium nitride power portfolio, which is now sampling to provide enhanced efficiency, thermal performance, and power density. This new lineup includes FETs ranging from 40V to 650V, […]
